title: Corley, Aidan - Head of Research and Messaging, Special Adviser to the Prime Minister No. 10 - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Corley left his role at No. 10 in May 2024  Chief of Staff, Cleo AI Ltd  Mr Corley sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Cleo AI Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
